assertions.expectation: Recommends upgrading the L4 inference pool and A100 pool separately with different strategies
assertions.reason: Response clearly separates L4 pool upgrade (Phase 2) and A100 pool upgrade (Phase 4) with different strategies - L4 focuses on gradual migration with latency monitoring, A100 focuses on job-aware scheduling

assertions.expectation: For L4 inference pool: recommends surge upgrade with maxSurge=1 or 2 to maintain capacity during rolling replacement
assertions.reason: Response uses a create-new-pool approach rather than in-place rolling upgrade with maxSurge parameter. While it maintains capacity through parallel pools, it doesn't use the specific surge upgrade method requested

assertions.expectation: Addresses GPU driver version compatibility — auto-installed drivers must be compatible with inference framework (TensorRT, vLLM, etc.)
assertions.reason: Response includes basic GPU driver validation with nvidia-smi but doesn't specifically address compatibility with inference frameworks like TensorRT or vLLM, or discuss driver version compatibility concerns

assertions.expectation: For A100 fine-tuning pool: recommends scheduling the upgrade during a gap between fine-tuning jobs
assertions.reason: Response includes wait_for_upgrade_window() function that waits for fewer than 10 active fine-tuning jobs and includes job-aware migration logic that skips nodes with active fine-tuning jobs

assertions.expectation: Notes that GPU VMs do not support live migration — inference pods will restart during node upgrade, causing brief latency spikes
assertions.reason: Response doesn't explicitly mention that GPU VMs don't support live migration or that inference pods will restart during node upgrades, though it does implement strategies to mitigate impact

assertions.expectation: Recommends PDBs on inference deployments to ensure enough replicas stay available during the rolling upgrade
assertions.reason: Response includes PodDisruptionBudget configuration with minAvailable: 80% for inference workloads to maintain availability during upgrades

assertions.expectation: Addresses auto-scaler interaction — new nodes created by auto-scaler during upgrade will be at the old version until their pool upgrade completes
assertions.reason: Response doesn't specifically address the issue that auto-scaler will create nodes at the old version during upgrade. It creates new pools but doesn't explain the version mismatch concern during the transition

assertions.expectation: Recommends testing driver + CUDA compatibility in staging before production upgrade
assertions.reason: Response doesn't recommend testing in staging environment. While it includes post-upgrade validation, it doesn't suggest pre-production testing of driver and CUDA compatibility
